examples: He's a man of few words, very polite and unassuming.
He was a small and by all appearances an unassuming man.
Advances in science and technology can launch from unassuming springboards.
It was a beautiful, unassuming church meticulously made out of stone and stained glass.
Unassuming in wrinkled khakis and a polo shirt, he is in near perpetual motion.
